case_id: Electricity, at grid, US or similar process with natural gas component

pi_items.source: Script analysis: export_result.sh (line 22) and task.json task description
Script analysis: export_result.sh (line 59) uses regex 'natural gas|electricity|power'; Web search confirms USLCI database includes electricity generation processes with natural gas as fuel source
Task description requires exporting a single process in JSON-LD format; export_result.sh (line 56) checks for .json files
Web search and openLCA schema documentation (https://greendelta.github.io/olca-schema/); confirmed by export_result.sh (line 52) checking for 'processes' folder

privileged_info_summary: The task uses the real U.S. Life Cycle Inventory Database (USLCI) from NREL, obtained from https://github.com/FLCAC-admin/uslci-content. The USLCI database contains more than 550 real LCA processes including 'Electricity, at grid, US' which involves natural gas as one of the fuel sources. When exporting in JSON-LD format, openLCA creates a zip archive with standard folders including 'processes' and 'flows' containing JSON files. The task requires finding a process related to natural gas electricity generation and exporting it to ~/LCA_Results/natural_gas_electricity.zip with the expected structure of processes folder containing JSON files with keywords: natural gas, electricity, and/or power.
